summary: Self-distillation bootstraps LLMs by training on their own generations; existing methods rely on external signals or raw outputs, and outputs entangle task-relevant capability with style/artifacts/errors.
SPD uses a small calibration set to extract a low-rank capability subspace from gradients on correctness-defining token positions, then uses KV projection hooks during self-generation.
SPD can be viewed as distilling an internally selected version of the model own policy back into the original model.
Correctness-aligned loss is computed only on token positions directly tied to task success, reducing influence of style or task-irrelevant noise.
L_align(q,y) = - 1/|S| sum_{t in S} log p_theta_old(z_t | z_<t).
Apply SVD to K/V gradient matrices, keep top-r right singular vectors, form projection matrices P_K and P_V, and project K/V activations during generation.
Projection hooks do not modify model parameters; hooks only shape self-generated training distribution and are removed during fine-tuning/evaluation.
Domain-specific and in-domain generalization results across Qwen2.5/Qwen3/Llama backbones; SPD often improves over base, PSR and SSD.
QA-calibrated SPD transfers to Math and Code, e.g. GSM8K 11.0 base to 26.0 SPD-QA and MBPP 17.0 to 21.0.
SPD-generated data are more compact and task-focused than base and SSD examples.
Before fine-tuning, SPD-generated data improve over SSD on MBPP, GSM8K, and BBH under Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct.
After fine-tuning, SPD reaches 25.5 MBPP, 22.0 GSM8K, 32.0 SVAMP, 49.0 MMLU, 38.7 BBH on Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct.
Correctness-aligned loss outperforms full-sequence loss across all reported domains; MBPP 25.5 vs 11.9 and GSM8K 22.0 vs 13.0.
Performance remains stable across 20-500 calibration examples, suggesting small calibration sets can estimate useful capability subspaces.
Correctness-defining spans: MBPP assertion-relevant spans, MMLU answer letter after Answer:, GSM8K final numeric answer span.
SPD procedure: collect correctness-aligned gradients, SVD, projection matrices, hooked generation, remove hooks, LoRA fine-tune.
